description: Create package.json files for packages that lack them (media, payments, notifications, social-graph, search) and install all SDK dependencies needed for Phase 10. Also add tsconfig.json to each package.
steps: Create packages/payments/package.json (name: @quant/payments) with dependency on stripe, zod, ioredis, pino. Follow the pattern of packages/queue/package.json.
Create packages/payments/tsconfig.json following project pattern (composite, ESNext module, bundler moduleResolution).

Create packages/media/package.json (name: @quant/media) with dependencies: fluent-ffmpeg, @ffmpeg-installer/ffmpeg, @aws-sdk/client-cloudfront, @aws-sdk/cloudfront-signer, zod, pino. DevDeps: @types/fluent-ffmpeg.
Create packages/notifications/package.json (name: @quant/notifications) with deps: firebase-admin, @parse/node-apn, zod, pino.
Create packages/social-graph/package.json (name: @quant/social-graph) with deps: @prisma/client, ioredis, zod, pino, @quant/common workspace:*.
Create packages/search/package.json (name: @quant/search) with deps: meilisearch, zod, pino, @quant/common workspace:*.

Create services/smtp-inbound/package.json (name: @quant/smtp-inbound) with deps: smtp-server, mailparser, nodemailer, zod, pino, @quant/common workspace:*. DevDeps: @types/smtp-server, @types/mailparser, @types/nodemailer.
Run pnpm install at root to install all dependencies.
Verify pnpm install succeeds without errors.
acceptance_criteria: All 5 packages and 1 service have package.json and tsconfig.json
pnpm turbo typecheck runs without package resolution errors for these packages
